mapper.select: SELECT b.id, v.name AS venue_name, b.booking_date, b.time_slots AS slots, b.status, b.created_at, b.purpose, b.p_count, b.contact_info, GROUP_CONCAT(e.name SEPARATOR ',') AS equipments FROM bookings b LEFT JOIN venues v ON b.venue_id = v.id LEFT JOIN booking_equipment be ON b.id = be.booking_id LEFT JOIN equipments e ON be.equipment_id = e.id WHERE b.venue_id = #{venueId} AND b.booking_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND b.status = 1 AND b.status != 4 GROUP BY b.id ORDER BY b.created_at ASC

SELECT b.id, v.name AS venue_name, b.booking_date, b.time_slots AS slots, b.status, b.created_at, b.purpose, b.p_count, b.contact_info, GROUP_CONCAT(e.name SEPARATOR ',') AS equipments FROM bookings b LEFT JOIN venues v ON b.venue_id = v.id LEFT JOIN booking_equipment be ON b.id = be.booking_id LEFT JOIN equipments e ON be.equipment_id = e.id WHERE b.id = #{bookingId} AND b.status != 4 GROUP BY b.id
mapper.update:
UPDATE bookings SET status = #{newStatus}, version = version + 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}
UPDATE bookings SET status = 4, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{bookingId}
